heroHeadline: 2,686 Years of Japanese History: From Imperial Founding to Modern Democracy
heroSubtitle: Tracking Japan's evolution from legendary origins through feudal shogunates, imperial expansion, WWII defeat, and postwar transformation into Asia's most mature democracy
footerNote: Data sourced from the National Archives of Japan, National Diet Library, UNESCO World Heritage records, IAEA, World Bank, IMF, and major academic institutions.
